hero.hero_overview:
Estes stands as the most powerful support hero in terms of healing. His exceptional regenerative abilities render him virtually unstoppable, sustaining both himself and his allies with remarkable efficiency.
Even the ultimate skills of heroes such as Ammon, Saber, or Eudora, alongside other high-damage opponents, pose little concern when supported by his extraordinary healing capacity.
hero.hero_strength: As noted, Estes possesses the highest healing capability in MLBB, particularly through his ultimate, which restores the health of all nearby allies. For this reason, he serves as an excellent choice when paired with durable heroes.
hero.hero_weakness: Like most supports, Estes has relatively low HP, making him an easy target if not properly protected by his teammates. However, even when under attack, with the right equipment and by applying his skills to himself, he can often survive until reinforcements arrive. Additionally, his healing is not particularly strong during the early stages of the game.

hero.hero_weakness: His defense is weak and the goal is easy for his team.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Beatrix's high DPS relies on staying alive during fights. Estes healing ensures Beatrix can sustain her damage output and kite enemies effectively.
Uranus is a regen tank who thrives in prolonged battles and Estes healing amplifies Uranus natural sustain making him nearly unkillable during team fights.
Alucard's lifesteal and aggressive play style benefit greatly from Estes's healing, allowing him to dive into fights without worrying about being burst down.
Fredrinn excels as a tank/fighter with strong sustain and control. Estes's support enhances Fredrinn's ability to stay in the frontline and distrupt the enemy team longer.
Esmeralda's shields and sustain make her hard to kill and with Estes backing her, she becomes even more resilient and dominating in extended team fights.

Barats is a durable fighter who becomes increasing tanky as his stack mechanic grows, allowing him to to dominate in prolonged engagement. Estes complements Barats by enhancing his survivability with healing, ensuring he can continue to absorb damage and deal crowd control effectively in team fights or ganking.

counters.counter_desc: Lou Yi's AoE damage and crowd control can disrupt Estes positioning and hit multiple targets at once, bypassing his single-target healing.

Baxia's skill Tortoise Puissance reduces all healing effects on enemies hit by his skills, making Estes healing less effective and also his durability allows him to dive into the backline and disrupt Estes directly.
Kaja counters Estes because his 3rd skill Divine Judgment can suppress and isolate Estes, making him unable to heal or support his team.

Chou's 3rd skill Way of the Dragon can isolate Estes from his team, prevention him from healing ang making him an easy target for burst damage. Also, his mobility and crowd control make it difficult for Estes to position safely.
Kadita's high burst damage and crowd control can instantly eliminate Estes before he can react with his healing abilities. Her mobility also allows her to easily reach Estes in the backline.
Lancelot's mobility and burst damage let him dive directly onto Estes.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Stay safe and focus on supporting the jungler.

1. Stay near to the jungler and secure buffs.
2. Avoid venturing too far without allies.
3. Use 2nd skill (Domain of Moon Goddess) to provide early vision on farming avoiding being invaded by enemies.
4. Conserve mana since Estes skills consume significant mana early on, so use them strategically.

Sustain your team and support in objectives.

1. Use ultimate wisely especially for critical moments when your team is grouped and taking heavy damage.
2. Have map awareness since Estes lacks escape abilities, stay aware of enemy movements and avoid roaming alone.
3. Stay in the backline to avoid being targeted by assassins or burst damage.

Provide strategic healing to help your team win crucial fights

1. Always stay behind your frontliners but close enough to heal and make them more sustainable.
2. Focus on priorities, stick to your carry and ensure their survival as they are crucial for dealing damage.
3. Use 2nd skill (Domain of Moon Goddess) to slow enemies, disrupting their movement and making it easier for your team to secure kills.
4. Adjust your item build and positioning base on the enemy composition.

emblems.emblem_desc:
The support emblem is like tailor-made for Estes, it will enhance his healing, utility and mobility. 

Emblem Talents:
1. Agility - Helps Estes reposition and stay with teammates by the extra movement speed.

2. Wilderness Blessing - Helps Estes to rotate faster especially in jungle supporting the jungler on turtle/lord fights.

3. Focusing Mark - Enhances the damage output of allies that Estes heals or links which maximizes team synergy.

equips.equip_desc: This build focuses on providing Estes more healing potential and durability. The key equipment is the Flask of the Oasis which gives a large healing effect and grants allies a shield.

hero.hero_overview: Estes is a support hero known for his powerful healing abilities. He excels in sustaining his team during team fights making him  very useful on survivability and prolonged battles.
hero.hero_strength: Estes abilities allow him to restore large amount of HP for himself and allies, making him one of the best healers in the game. Also, Estes skills are easy to use or a straightforward play style makes him beginner friendly while still impactful in high-tier ranks.
hero.hero_weakness: Estes requires careful positioning to avoid being burst down and a high burst or crowd control can make his healing ineffective.

spell.spell_desc: Flicker enhances Estes survivability by allowing him to escape when targeted by assassins or caught in dangerous situations. It is useful since Estes has no mobility skills and is often a priority target in team fights.

hero.hero_overview:
While Estes is really not the mostly picked hero on ranked game recently.. Estes is very strong with giving sustains and heals for teammates, Estes gives huge amounts of healing to teammates specially when paired up with another sustain teammates such as Terizla, Barats, and Faramis. 

Trick is just stay with your marksman or gold laner while there are still no turtle or lords on the Map.. before the turtle or lord spawns you must follow your jungler to get objectives
hero.hero_strength:
Estes is really overpowered when full build at late game..

There are two types of builds for Estes for you to use.. its either you build mostly high magic power builds just like Holy Crystal.. you might be easily take down by this build but it heals you a lot.. or you might build tanky builds just like Antique cuirass. Its tanky but you give less heals and sustains.
hero.hero_weakness:
Estes only weakness are the item Sea Halberd and other anti healing items.. for heroes these are Estes worst enemies possible or counter heroes
Fanny, Benedetta, Freya, Dyrroth, Melissa
